# ResurgenceBuilds.com

> The top independent resource hub for The Division Resurgence — builds, guides, exotic weapons, weapon tier lists, patch notes, and Dark Zone intel.

## Site Purpose
ResurgenceBuilds.com is a community-driven wiki for The Division Resurgence mobile/PC game by Ubisoft. We provide in-game tested builds, weapon databases, gear set references, tactical guides, and patch note analysis. All content is tested on the current live patch.

## Content Overview
- /builds/ — Optimized meta and off-meta loadouts for all 5 specializations (Vanguard, Demolitionist, Field Medic, Tech Operator, Bulwark). PvE, PvP, and hybrid setups with full gear breakdowns.
- /guides/ — Tactical guides covering hidden mechanics, specialization selection, PvP techniques, damage types, and advanced build theory.
- /news/ — Developer stream summaries, patch analysis, community sentiment, and breaking updates.
- /patch-notes/ — Detailed patch note breakdowns with build impact analysis and meta shift tracking.
- /database/ — Weapon talents, gear set effects, OS Protocols, exotic weapons, skill mod combos, bonus attributes. Searchable reference tables.
- /tier-list/ — Monthly updated weapon tier list based on real gameplay testing.
- /builder/ — Interactive build planner tool for creating and sharing loadouts.

## Game Details
- Game: Tom Clancy's The Division Resurgence
- Developer: Ubisoft Bucharest
- Publisher: Ubisoft Mobile
- Platforms: iOS, Android, PC (Ubisoft Connect)
- Current Season: Season 2
- Current Patch: 1.3.0

## Specializations
- Vanguard (subclasses: Commando, Recon Scout)
- Demolitionist (subclasses: HE Grenade, Flashguard)
- Bulwark (subclasses: Juggernaut, Breacher)
- Field Medic (subclasses: Combat Medicine, Tactical Pharma)
- Tech Operator (subclasses: Offensive, Aegis)

## Exotic Weapons (Current)
- Lady Death (SMG) — Talent: Breathe Free
- Warlord (Assault Rifle) — Talent: Play Rough
- Strawberry Milkshake (LMG) — Talent: Anarchy

## Key Build Guides
- /builds/tactical-pharma-800k-dps-rank-1-global-build/ — Field Medic Tactical Pharma DPS build (800k+ sustained)
- /builds/agenthuntzmans-leaderboard-ranking-vanguard-support-build/ — Vanguard Recon Scout full team-support build
- /builds/geneva-suggestion-field-medic-12/ — Field Medic Corrosive Skill DPS build
